products.title: Cyberpunk City Street (Kitbash)
products.description: A comprehensive kit of 45 modular pieces designed to construct gritty, high-fidelity cyberpunk streetscapes. Includes modular neon signs, vending machines, debris, industrial pipes, structural walkways, fire escapes, and detailed building facades. Fully textured with high-resolution procedural materials and custom decals. Perfect for concept art, game environments, and cinematic sequences.

products.title: Sci-Fi Mech Crawler (Rigged)
products.description: An industrial, four-legged defense or mining mech crawler. Fully rigged with an advanced inverse kinematics (IK) leg setup, animated hatches, rotatable weapon/sensor turrets, and realistic hydraulic pistons. Includes detailed cockpit interior and clean substance-painted PBR materials. Optimized for subdivision surface and ready to animate.

products.title: Stylized Orc Warrior Hero
products.description: A high-quality stylized Orc Warrior character. Sculpted in high detail, retopologized with optimized edge flow for deformation, and hand-painted in Blender. Fully rigged with Auto-Rig Pro (includes face rigging) and loaded with basic animations (Idle, Walk, Run, Strike). Outfitted with highly-detailed armor and a two-handed combat battleaxe.

products.title: Cinematic Studio Lighting Kit
products.description: Professional 3-point and cinematic studio lighting rigs designed specifically for Blender Cycles and EEVEE. Includes 10 customizable lighting presets (Dramatic Portrait, Moody Sci-Fi, Product Clean, High-Key, Sunset Backlight, and more). Easy appendable collections with preset backdrop cards, camera rigs, and pre-calibrated exposure/color-grading settings.

products.title: Procedural Rust & Metal Shaders
products.description: A pack of 6 fully procedural rust and metal shaders for Blender Cycles. No image textures required — infinite resolution, fully customizable parameters via a clean node group interface (rust intensity, scale, roughness, oxidation hue, metal wear). Perfect for industrial assets, old vehicles, and apocalyptic scene designs.

products.title: Low-Poly Adventure Prop Pack
products.description: A collection of 35 game-ready adventure-themed low-poly props. Includes treasure chests (open/closed variants), campfires, torches, weapons (swords, shields, bows), camping tents, backpacks, navigation compasses, food items, and environmental clutter. Includes a single optimized texture atlas to keep draw calls low in your game engine of choice.
